title: Jaam's Weaponry
description: Expand your arsenal with new weapons and unique combat mechanics.
body:
## 📖 Overview: **Jaam’s Weaponry** is a vanilla+ combat expansion designed to greatly broaden the range of playstyles available to players. Focused on expanding and refining Minecraft’s combat system, the mod introduces a large collection of new weapons, each with its own unique mechanics and behaviors that make every fight feel distinct and impactful. The mod introduces a wide variety of new armaments while also reworking and enhancing the existing vanilla arsenal and the equipment used by vanilla mobs. These improvements make both new and familiar weapons feel more cohesive, balanced, and exciting to use throughout the game’s progression. It aims to make combat more immersive, strategic, and rewarding by encouraging players to master timing, movement, and creativity. Each weapon addition allows players to develop their own fighting style and adapt to new challenges, offering fresh approaches to both PvE and PvP encounters.


## 🎯 Features: - **+50 new weapons, including tiered, unique, ranged, and firearms.** - **+50 new weapon abilities and mechanics, like dual wielding and weapon blocking.** - **New effects, enchantments, and advancements.** - **Improved vanilla mob enemy equipment.** - **Vanilla combat and weapons improvements.** - **Weapon skins and easter eggs.** - **Dedicated mod compatibility.** - **Advanced tooltips system.** - **Extensive configuration options.** - **And more!**
Spoiler


## 🤝 Compability: - [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) - [Epic Fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight) - [Jaam's Shinerite](https://modrinth.com/mod/jaams-shinerite) - [Deeper Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeper_caves) - [Majrusz's Progressive Difficulty](https://modrinth.com/mod/majruszs-progressive-difficulty) - [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) - [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries)


## ⚙️ Recommended Mods: - [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) - [Enchantment Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions) - [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) - [Just Enough Effect Descriptions (JEED)](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-enough-effect-descriptions-jeed) - [Configured](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured) - [Catalogue](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/catalogue)


## 🚧 Future Plans: - **Themed updates and Integration of community feedback.** - **More weapon types and combat mechanics.** - **Additional configuration options and new quality-of-life improvements.** - **Expanded compatibility with other major mods.** - **Mod wiki with extensive documentation.**
